title: NIMER Employee Evaluation Scale
description: Employee performance evaluation questionnaire based on NIMER Employee Performance Evaluation Tool.
privacy_reminder: The data gathered will be handled in accordance with RA 10173 or the Data Privacy Act of 2012, and will be utilised only for the intended purpose.

rating_scale.label: OUTSTANDING
rating_scale.definition: Exceptional Performance. The employee is an exceptional performer.

rating_scale.label: VERY SATISFACTORY
rating_scale.definition: Exceeds Standards. The employee exceeds established standards.

rating_scale.label: SATISFACTORY
rating_scale.definition: Fully Meets Standards. The employee meets established standards.

rating_scale.label: BELOW SATISFACTORY
rating_scale.definition: Below Standards. The employee is inconsistent in meeting most established standards.

rating_scale.label: UNSATISFACTORY
rating_scale.definition: Fails to Meet Standards. The employee does not meet minimum established standards.

questionnaire_content.domain_description: Commitment to the institution, to the job, to the unit/office, to coworkers, and to policies and procedures.

questions.indicator: Shows a positive attitude at work
Interacts well with other members of the organisation
Helps create a productive work environment
Is optimistic about growing professionally in this organisation
Accepts willingly new assignments or additional tasks
Cooperates with the team/unit to attain goals
Follows safety standards and promotes a safe workplace

questionnaire_content.domain_description: The employee brings a contagious positive energy in the workplace, promoting productivity, and going above and beyond what is required.

questions.indicator: Is willing to work overtime if necessary
Volunteers to do things without being asked
Does more than what is required to get the job done
Assists co-workers with issues relating to their jobs
Reports to work ready
Delivers work on time and in accordance with office policies and procedures
Perseveres in finishing tasks/assignments despite challenges

questionnaire_content.domain_description: Makes a positive impression at work, respected by coworkers, and shows concern for others.

questions.indicator: Instead of complaining, seeks solutions to problems
Is respected by his/her coworkers
Genuinely cares about the success of the team or unit
Demonstrates a calm and steady presence even in challenging situations
Is comfortable asking for assistance from others when necessary
Has the ability to resolve conflicts at work
Has the ability to make decisions and stick to them

questionnaire_content.domain_description: Delivers quality outputs, uses resources efficiently and effectively.

questions.indicator: Sets high standards for one's performance
Uses time effectively by getting more of the important work done in a day
Efficiently uses resources to complete assigned tasks
Consistently produces quality outputs in a timely manner
Demonstrates attention to detail
Willing to take on difficult and challenging tasks
Coworkers value and respect his/her work

questionnaire_content.domain_description: The employee has the required sets of knowledge, skills, and abilities to perform assigned tasks.

questions.indicator: Keeps job knowledge up-to-date
Keeps job skills up-to-date
Demonstrates a thorough understanding of the job
Recognised by peers for technical expertise
Performs tasks specific to area of expertise reliably, skilfully, and accurately
Completes difficult tasks without supervisory assistance
Directs/Assists co-workers in carrying out highly technical tasks

questionnaire_content.domain_description: The employee knows what is expected and focuses on delivering that.

questions.indicator: Consistently achieves agreed-upon targets
Prioritises tasks that need to be performed in order to meet certain goals
Knows what the ideal outcomes are and helps the team in achieving them
Always seeks to find ways to improve performance
Willing to challenge co-workers and help them address poor performance
Takes actions that result in measurable service improvements
Accepts accountability for results

comments_prompts.positive_feedback: Say something positive about the person.
